# Kalkan - iOS Spam Call Blocker & Caller ID

## About
Kalkan is a free iOS application that blocks spam calls and identifies unknown phone numbers. It protects users — especially children and elderly — from unwanted calls, scams, and phone fraud.

## How It Works
- Downloads a comprehensive spam number database to the user's device
- Uses iOS Call Directory Extension for call blocking and identification
- All protection happens offline on the device
- Does not access user contacts or call logs
- Regular database updates for new spam numbers

## Key Features
- Spam Protection: Automatically blocks known spam numbers
- Caller Identification: Shows information about unknown incoming calls
- Extra Protection: Extended pattern-based blocking for additional coverage
- Communication Reporting: Users can report suspicious numbers

## Privacy
- No access to contacts or call history
- All processing happens locally on device
- Data is never sold to third parties
- KVKK (Turkish Data Protection) compliant

## Download
- App Store: https://apple.co/4cYKmRG

## Frequently Asked Questions
- Q: Is Kalkan free? A: Yes. General Protection and Caller ID features are completely free.
- Q: Does Kalkan work offline? A: Yes. The spam database is downloaded to device and works without internet.
- Q: Does Kalkan access my contacts? A: No. Kalkan never accesses your contacts or call history.
- Q: How does Kalkan block calls? A: Through iOS Call Directory Extension with a preloaded spam database.
- Q: Is Kalkan good for elderly? A: Yes. It automatically protects against scam calls without requiring user action.
